description_long: This lighthouse features a robust, white-painted masonry tower with a flared base and red trim along the bottom edge. The upper section is crowned by a large, black metal lantern room encased in glass panels, topped with a domed roof and a weather vane. A gallery balcony with a metal railing encircles the lantern room, providing access for maintenance. The structure includes several small windows and a metal door at the base, as well as a vertical ladder leading up to the balcony. Various metal fixtures and pipes are attached to the exterior, suggesting utility and functionality. The lighthouse stands on a circular concrete platform, giving it a solid foundation suitable for coastal or urban placement.
description: A white masonry lighthouse with a flared base, red trim, and a black domed lantern room encircled by a gallery balcony. The structure features windows, a metal door, and utility fixtures on a circular platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, vertical ladder, and prominent flared base with red trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gallery balcony, lantern room, and attached metal utility fixtures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flared base, balcony, and lantern room with minimal utility fixtures visible.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the metal door, windows, and additional utility pipes extending from the base.
